unit: W1 — Marketplace skeleton + V9 manifest tripwire test

contract.goal: Establish marketplace.json + 6 per-plugin identity files + V9 tripwire test so the marketplace shape exists for subsequent workstreams to populate.
acceptance_criteria: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json exists at repo root with name=krambuhl, owner={name,email}, 6 plugin entries each with name+source+description; deps on marketplace entries (bare strings) per PLAN § Decisions.

cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts (new) asserts 6 entries with required fields, source dirs exist, plugin.json names match marketplace entries, deps resolve within marketplace, and the per-PLAN dependency edges (loom→guild+griot, ev→loom+guild+griot, agent-loop-full→all five) hold.
npm test green; V9 test contributes new passing assertions.
rules_applied: V4-verified dependencies field name; PLAN-specified placement on marketplace entries (not plugin.json).
OQ1 resolution: relative source paths ./plugins/<name> resolved relative to marketplace root.
Test flavor matches cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts (static fixture + vitest assertions).

Manual panel composition per agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md *.test.ts mapping (evaluator-contract-fit + evaluator-test-unit). bin/guild derive-panel fell back to contract-fit only due to a path-lookup bug; manual override compensated.
disqualifiers: No skill/agent/cli/bin/hook content under plugins/<name>/ (W2/W4/W6/W7 own those).
No top-level skills/agents/cli relocation (W7 handles per-plugin copies).
inputs: projects/2026-05-19-marketplace-portable-install/PLAN.md (§ Scope, § V9, § OQ1 resolution, § V4 dep field shape, § Decisions placement)

actions: Created plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/ subdirs for the 6 plugins (mkdir -p).
Wrote .claude-plugin/marketplace.json with 6 entries (griot, guild, loom, ev, review-skill, agent-loop-full); bare-string dependencies on the 3 entries that need them.

Wrote 6 plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json files (name + version 0.1.0 + description). Per-plugin descriptions mirror the marketplace-entry description for now; will diverge as plugins gain content (W4/W7).

Wrote cli/marketplace-manifest.test.ts following the cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts flavor — static reads via readFileSync + vitest assertions. 5 describe blocks: file existence, top-level shape, plugin entries (per-entry sub-describe loop), intra-marketplace dependencies resolve, declared dependency edges per PLAN.

Manually composed evaluator panel (evaluator-contract-fit + evaluator-test-unit) per agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md mapping for *.test.ts; bin/guild derive-panel's fallback to contract-fit-only would have under-covered the new test file.

Invoked /guild-validate → both evaluators returned approved. evaluator-test-unit surfaced 2 advisory findings: (a) loose toBeTruthy on owner.name + plugin.json version (lines 78, 126), (b) cross-marketplace dep branch silently no-ops if a future cross-marketplace dep is added (lines 146-153).

Applied both advisory findings as free polish: replaced toBeTruthy() with .toMatch(/.+/) on the two callsites; refactored the dep-resolve loop to filter cross-marketplace deps with a continue rather than generate a no-op test. Re-ran V9: still 57/57 passed.

changes_since_previous: W0 (commit 4a798ad) captured V1 + OQ2 evidence as substrate-only notes; W1 lands the first real artifacts (marketplace.json + 6 plugin.json identity files + V9 test). Per-plugin source directories created but otherwise empty pending W2+/W7's content adds.
notes_for_pr: Marketplace identity established: name=krambuhl, owner=Evan Krambuhl. 6 plugin entries with relative source paths (./plugins/<name>) per OQ1 resolution. Dependencies declared on marketplace entries (per PLAN § Decisions) as bare strings; cascade map: loom→[guild,griot]; ev→[loom,guild,griot]; agent-loop-full→[griot,guild,loom,ev,review-skill].

Per-plugin .claude-plugin/plugin.json files are minimal identity at this stage — name, version (0.1.0), description. Component layout (skills/, agents/, cli/, bin/) follows conventional plugin paths and gets populated by W4/W6/W7. No strict:false escape hatch needed.

V9 (marketplace-manifest.test.ts) is a 57-assertion tripwire that catches malformed-manifest failure modes before claude plugin install silently rejects them. Test pattern matches the existing cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts (static fixture + vitest). claude plugin validate independently confirms manifest shape is well-formed.

Substrate-path bug surfaced for follow-up: bin/guild derive-panel looks for .claude/agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md but the file lives at agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md. The verb falls back to evaluator-contract-fit only, under-covering code units. Fix should land alongside the agent-layout settling in this migration (W4 or substrate cleanup). For this unit the panel was composed manually per the spec to compensate.

Two advisory findings from evaluator-test-unit applied inline as free polish: loose toBeTruthy → toMatch(/.+/) on owner.name + version; cross-marketplace-dep silent-no-op branch refactored to filter rather than generate empty tests.
